title: MASTERTOP Industrial Mop, Looped-End String Mop with 53" Long Stainless Steel Handle & 2 Reusable Heads, Heavy Duty Commercial Mops for Home Wood, Marble, Ceramic Tile, Floor Cleaning
features: ❤Easy to install: There is jaw clamp on the bottom of the industrial mop, easy to remove and install. The installation of the mop is very relax, you only need to connect the handle and fix the mop head with the claw clip, the whole installation process is very easy. The industrial mop has a hanging ring on the top, which can be hung and stored when not in use without taking up extra space.

❤2 cotton yarn mop heads: Simple and stylish design, mop heads in different colors (blue and yellow) are easy to distinguish different scenes and avoid confusion. The thoughtful claw clip design is convenient for you to replace the mop head at any time. The industrial cotton mop head can not only be hand washed but also machine washed. You can put it in the washing machine hundreds of times, the cotton mop head will not deform and fade.

❤Adjustable handle: The industrial mop handle is made of stainless steel and has a length of 52.9 inches. The handle is long enough to avoid repeated bending of the knees and waist during use, and the length of the handle can also be adjusted according to your height. This thoughtful design can protect your back and effectively prevent back pain caused by long-term labor.

❤Looped-End String mop: This industrial mop uses a ring spinning process at the end to reduce the daily wear and knotting of the mop, avoid shedding during use and cleaning, make it more durable and allow for efficient cleaning.

❤Multiple scenes: The Looped-End mop is suitable for multiple scenes, including office, garage, restaurant floor, warehouse and home wood floors. Its mop head is very soft and will not damage the floor surface. If you have any questions about usage or installation, you can contact us anytime, we will reply your questions within 24 hours and provide you with a satisfactory answer.
description: Product Description MASTERTOP Industrial Mop Looped-End String mop The end of this industrial mop uses an end loop process to reduce daily wear and knots in the mop and prevent it from falling off during use. Adjustable handle Industrial mop handle is made of stainless steel, the length can be adjusted from 150cm to 164cm, long enough to protect your back,. Easy to install The industrial mop has jaw clamps on the bottom. The mop is easy to install,attach the handle, fix the mop head with the jaw clamp. Super absorbent The cotton yarn mop head is super absorbent and can quickly absorb water stains on the floor, not easily leaving water marks.
